log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Elf — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Elf — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Elf — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Elf — Iron Concentration HP: 46/67
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Elf — Iron Concentration HP: 27/67
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 29 damage. Elf — Iron Concentration HP: -2/67
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Elf — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14

--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18

→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Elf — Iron Concentration HP: 53/67

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Elf — Iron Concentration --- HP: 37/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Elf — Iron Concentration --- HP: 37/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Elf — Iron Concentration --- HP: 37/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 15] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 174/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 174/178 | AC: 18
